title: Agent Endpoint Response
description: Response body returned by the Mosaic AI Agent serving endpoint.

answer.description: Grounded natural-language answer. Empty string with grounded=false if no sources.

grounded.description: True iff the answer is supported by at least one citation.

citations.description: Sources used to ground the answer. May be empty when grounded=false.

char_offset.description: Optional offset into the section text.

snippet.description: Optional short snippet for hover preview.

retrieved_count.description: Total candidates pulled before re-ranking trim.

agent_path.description: Which agent handled the request; logged for evaluation slicing.

turn_id.description: Lakebase query_logs row id; used by feedback POST.
